name: Ignis Draconis
title: the Ash Walker
lore:
When the Primordial Dragon fell, its soul was shattered into six fragments of avatars that would later be referred to as the Dragon Knights, or the Draconis siblings.

Ignis is the fifth sibling, wielding the elemental power of fire. She is a specialised warrior whose scales were forged in the heart of a supernova. Ignis grows stronger the more magical heat she absorbs, turning the enemy's spells into fuel for her own devastating flames.

abilities.name: Cinder Scales
abilities.details: Every time Ignis is hit by an enemy ability, she gains a Cinder Scale (maximum 4 stacks). Each stack grants her increased tenacity.[n]At max stacks, her next basic attack consumes them to deal bonus [ap]magical damage[/] (scaling with [mr]magical resistance[/]) in an explosion.

abilities.name: Magma Orb
abilities.details: Ignis launches a fireball in the target direction that explodes upon colliding with the first enemy or reaching maximum range, dealing [ap]magical damage[/] (scaling with [mr]magical resistance[/]) to enemies hit.[n]If the fireball passes through the Infernal Wall, the explosion radius is [bf]larger[/] and it will also reduce the enemies' [db]magical resistance[/].

abilities.name: Infernal Wall
abilities.details: Ignis creates a wall of fire that blocks enemy projectiles and deals [ap]magical damage[/] (scaling with [mr]magical resistance[/]) to enemies who pass through.

abilities.name: Scorching Charge
abilities.details: Ignis charges forward, dealing [ap]magical damage[/] (scaling with [mr]magical resistance[/]) to all enemies in her path.[n]If Ignis passes through the Infernal Wall, her body ignites, leaving a trail of fire in her path that deals [ap]magical damage[/] (scaling with [mr]magical resistance[/]) and [db]slowing[/] all enemies on top.

abilities.name: Dragon's Breath
abilities.details: Ignis exhales a stream of fire in a cone for a few seconds, dealing [ap]magical damage[/] (scaling with [mr]magical resistance[/]) over time to all enemies hit.[n]If the fire passes through her Infernal Wall, the cone becomes wider, deals more damage, and the duration is extended.
